spec_natural_language: function setTopNPools MUST NOT revert when called by the owner

violated_invariant.expected_behavior: Owner should be allowed to call setTopNPools successfully, but current onlyExecutor modifier causes revert

extraction_reasoning: The finding clearly states the intended behavior (callable by owner OR executor) and the bug (onlyExecutor modifier blocks owner). The access control violation is unambiguous - the modifier is too restrictive compared to documented/intended behavior.
